title: Over Vulkan
description: Better performance than sodium using Vulkan rendering. 5x more fps compared to Vanilla.
body:
Over Vulkan uses a rendering mod called VulkanMod giving it **better performance** than Sodium. Normal Minecraft uses OpenGL for rendering. Vulkan is a different way of rendering a game, with waaay better performance. Expect around **500% more fps** compared to vanilla (Dependent on your hardware).  
  
_Example: **200** Vanilla to **>1000** Over Vulkan (render distance at 16 Vanilla and 32 for Over Vulkan)_

### Compatibility
Because this pack uses a different way of rendering, Vulkan, some mods wont be compatible. Mainly mods that adjust major visuals like Distant Horizons. Here is a [list](https://github.com/xCollateral/VulkanMod/wiki/Incompatible-mods) (note: this list is outdated, check the VulkanMod discord for an up to date list). It's compatible with servers.  

### Gameplay
No changes are made to the gameplay, because this pack is designed to be a foundation for your own pack or an optimized version of vanilla.

### Requirements
To speed up chunk generation and general performance, a minimum of **2500-3500 Mb** allocated memory is recommended. This is dependend on your render distance so playing with lower render distance allows a lower amount of allocated memory.  
_Installed Modpack > Settings > Java and memory > Memory allocated._

If you are experiencing stuttering, increase allocated memory or decrease render distance from the default 28!
***
![icon image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wrpRnrwT/images/2549b36abff25062f83e10878025bcff46f31571.webp)

>If the modpack crashes on startup, add this to Custom java arguments `-Dorg.lwjgl.system.stackSize=256`
